my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.why_exists: List.get(0) is not deprecated but List.getFirst() is the preferred modern API; however, this change is technically compatible with older JDKs if the method existed, but here it is a migration to the new API. Wait, List.getFirst() was added in Java 21. If the target is Java 21, using getFirst() is valid. Using get(0) is also valid. This is a polishment (modernization) unless get(0) was removed (it wasn't).
